perks: Three coverage tiers (Standard, Enhanced, Premier) for flexible protection
Claim-free discount for no claims in past three years
Declining deductible reduces your deductible $50 each claim-free year
Home systems protection covers mechanical breakdowns
Claim forgiveness available after three years with Farmers
Wide agent network for personalized coverage advice
drawbacks: Premiums among the highest of major carriers
Not available in all zip codes within certain states
Some coverage options require going through an agent, not self-service online
